basic_details.job_title: NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Meghalaya has invited applications for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position under the ISRO-RESPOND project titled “IRS Assisted Drones-based Communication for Remote Area Connectivity”. This is a great opportunity for candidates with M.Tech/M.E or GATE-qualified B.Tech/B.E/M.Sc degrees. The last date to submit the application is 24 July 2026. Find complete details about eligibility, salary, application process, and important dates below.

age_limit.age_details: ISRO, Department of Space, Govt. of India

qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: | M.Tech / M.E in RF and Microwave or Wireless Communication Engineering or related disciplines, OR M.Sc with valid GATE/NET qualification, OR GATE-qualified B.Tech / B.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or related disciplines. | Age Limit: Maximum 30 years (relaxation as per Institute norms). | Job Nature: Design, simulation, analysis, and prototyping of Intelligent Reflecting Surface (IRS) and Drones. | Other Benefits: Selected candidates are eligible to register for Ph.D. at NIT Meghalaya as per institute rules.

how_to_apply: Download and fill the prescribed Application Form (attached with the advertisement).
Prepare a single PDF file containing: Filled Application Form Brief Resume / CV Age proof, 10th, 12th, and highest qualification certificates & mark sheets
Age proof, 10th, 12th, and highest qualification certificates & mark sheets
Send the PDF via email to [email protected] with CC to [email protected] and [email protected].
Subject of the email: “Application for JRF Position for ISRO-Respond”
Shortlisted candidates will be informed and called for an Online/Offline Interview.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an interview call. Only shortlisted candidates will be communicated. Candidates must have good internet connectivity if the interview is conducted online.

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: NIT Meghalaya JRF Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: M.Tech / M.E in RF and Microwave or Wireless Communication Engineering or related disciplines, OR M.Sc with valid GATE/NET qualification, OR GATE-qualified B.Tech / B.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or related disciplines. Age Limit: Maximum 30 years (relaxation as per Institute norms). Job Nature: Design, simulation, analysis, and prototyping of Intelligent Reflecting Surface (IRS) and Drones. Other Benefits: Selected candidates are eligible to register for Ph.D. at NIT Meghalaya as per institute rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NIT Meghalaya JRF 2026
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed and called for an Online/Offline Interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Mere fulfillment of minimum qualifications does not guarantee an interview call. Only shortlisted candidates will be communicated. Candidates must have good internet connectivity if the interview is conducted online.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Meghalaya JRF 2026 under ISRO-RESPOND?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 24 July 2026 (11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF vacancies are available at NIT Meghalaya?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow in the ISRO-RESPOND project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF at NIT Meghalaya ISRO project?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 37,000/- per month + Hostel accommodation or 10% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for NIT Meghalaya JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: M.Tech/M.E in RF & Microwave/Wireless Communication or M.Sc with GATE/NET or GATE-qualified B.Tech/B.E in ECE.

faq.question: Q5. Is PhD required for JRF position at NIT Meghalaya?
faq.answer: No, PhD is not required. However, selected candidates can register for PhD at NIT Meghalaya.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIT Meghalaya ISRO JRF 2026?
faq.answer: Send the filled application form along with all documents in a single PDF to [email protected] with proper subject line.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for NIT Meghalaya Junior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: Maximum 30 years (age relaxation applicable as per norms).

faq.question: Q8. When will the interview be conducted for NIT Meghalaya JRF?
faq.answer: Tentative date of interview is 29 July 2026. Shortlisted candidates will be notified on 27.07.2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is the JRF position temporary or permanent?
faq.answer: The position is purely temporary for three years or till the project ends.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form for NIT Meghalaya JRF ISRO 2026?
faq.answer: The application proforma is attached with the official advertisement on the NIT Meghalaya website.
